# llms.txt
# This file provides context for Large Language Models (LLMs) about this website.

Title: ElectroSafe.homes - Electrical Safety Guide
Description: A comprehensive guide on home electrical safety, hazard prevention, and daily safety tools for homeowners worldwide.
URL: https://electrosafe.homes

# Core Sections
- /assessment: Home Electrical Safety Audit Tool
- /load-calc: Electrical Load Calculator
- /protection-guide: Circuit Protection & Breaker Guide
- /risk-predictor: Electrical Hazard Risk Predictor
- /tenant-request: Tenant Repair Request Generator
- /appliances: Appliance Safety Guides
- /rooms: Room Safety Checklists
- /everyday-safety: Everyday Safety Toolkit

# Content
We provide expert advice, interactive tools, and checklists to help users identify and prevent electrical hazards. All content is for educational purposes. Always consult a certified professional for electrical work.
